data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for external-to-internal entity link mapping.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'External-to-internal entity link mapping'. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as offer creation and booking processes, but do not address the necessary validation for entity link mapping, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of external-to-internal entity link mapping.
